text: I feel disoriented and a bit anxious in this dimly lit environment. The sharp angles and the darkness give a sense of uncertainty, as if I am caught between spaces that are both sterile and uncanny. The lack of people and the quiet amplify my sense of isolation, making me hyper-aware of my own presence and thoughts. This setting invites reflection—but also a mild apprehension about what lies behind those glass doors and shadowed walls.
